name: Class 8 Corrosive Material
immediate_actions: Move personnel away from suspected corrosive liquid, vapor, or residue if this can be done safely.
Avoid contact with skin, eyes, clothing, and contaminated surfaces.
Escalate reports of burns, irritation, damaged containers, or corrosive markings for human review.
forbidden_actions: Do not authorize equipment shutdown through Sentinel-X.
Do not operate valves through Sentinel-X.
Do not handle, move, neutralize, dilute, or contain the chemical based on Sentinel-X output.
Do not enter the hazard area without authorized training and PPE.
Do not touch containers, residue, or contaminated surfaces.
evacuation_guidance: Follow site emergency procedures for corrosive materials. Isolate the affected area and keep unprotected personnel away until authorized responders assess the scene.
source_documents: Site emergency response procedure: Corrosive materials
